chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-5561/2014 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 01.09.2021 Petitioner present. Syed Aminuddin advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG................ Comments and compliance report filed are taken on record. Report filed by learned AAG Sindh speaks that it is not within the spirit of orders passed by this court which speak that Chief Secretary shall personally call report from all Deputy Commissioners with regard to oil and gas companies’ funds and their utilization during last five years. Besides, counsel for respondent No.3 seeks time to place on record reason with regard to non-appointment of locals in the Kandanwari field as report reflects ratio of only 7.4% in appointments whereas in Bhit field, ratio of local employments reflects as 80%. Besides respondent No.3 shall examine the case of petitioner in view of his qualification, in case there is any vacancy company may consider him. J U D G E J U D G E IK
